description: Rebuild the NPA screening pipeline from a single rental-yield framework into a multi-strategy architecture. Each property gets scored against ALL viable strategies (RENT, FLIP, LAND BANK, RENO/HOSPITALITY) with a financial engineering overlay. Includes cascade logic (failed flip → rental candidate), leverage-aware scoring (CoCR parallel to NRY), investor profile input, and 16% IRR benchmark. Uses debate-validated constants: sale price × 0.92, rent × 0.85 (bare) / × 1.0 (furnished), 7% equity opportunity cost, 55 THB/sqm CAM default.

stories.title: Define shared models and constants
stories.description: Create the shared Pydantic models (InvestorProfile, StrategyScore, PropertyResult, FinancialMetrics) and constants module with all debate-validated values (rent haircuts, CAM default, SBT rates, IRR benchmark, equity cost). These are imported by all strategy scorers and the financial pre-filter.
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/models_v2.py exists with InvestorProfile, StrategyScore, PropertyResult, FinancialMetrics as frozen Pydantic models

File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/constants.py exists with all shared constants (VERIFIED_SALE_MULTIPLIER=0.92, VERIFIED_RENT_BARE=0.85, VERIFIED_RENT_FURNISHED=1.0, CAM_DEFAULT=55, EQUITY_COST=0.07, IRR_BENCHMARK=0.16, SBT_RATE=0.033, STAMP_DUTY=0.005, TRANSFER_FEE=0.02, WHT_RATE=0.03)
python -c 'from models_v2 import InvestorProfile, StrategyScore; print("OK")' runs without error from scripts directory
All constants are importable and match debate-agreed values

stories.title: Financial pre-filter (5 gates)
stories.description: Implement the 5 mandatory financial gates that run BEFORE any strategy scoring. Gates: (1) entry discount < exit costs + 10% → REJECT, (2) CoCR < 5% on leveraged deal → REJECT, (3) DSCR < 1.25 for income strategies → REJECT, (4) DSCR < 1.0 at +200bps → FLAG, (5) IRR < 16% → FLAG. Takes InvestorProfile + NpaCandidate, returns pass/fail with reasons.
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/financial_prefilter.py exists
Function financial_prefilter(candidate, investor_profile) returns PreFilterResult with pass_fail, flags, and reasons
Gate 1 rejects when discount_pct < (SBT + transfer + WHT) + 10
Gate 2 rejects when CoCR < 5% for mortgage investors
Gate 3 rejects when DSCR < 1.25 for rent/hospitality strategies
Gate 4 flags when DSCR < 1.0 at rate + 200bps
Gate 5 flags when IRR < 16% benchmark
Cash investors skip Gates 2-3 (no debt service)
pytest tests pass for all 5 gates with edge cases

stories.title: Rental strategy scorer
stories.description: Implement the RENT strategy scoring module with 11 metrics from the rental-strategy.md report. Key metrics: GRY with 85% rent haircut (bare) or 100% (furnished), NRY with full holding cost model, CoCR leverage override, Demand Anchor Score (DAS), supply pressure, seasonal adjustment. Includes parallel cash/leveraged tracks.
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/strategy_rent.py exists
Function score_rental(candidate, market_data, investor_profile) returns StrategyScore
GRY uses rent × 0.85 × 12 / price for bare units
GRY uses rent × 1.0 × 12 / price for furnished units (when investor_profile.renovation_budget > 0)
NRY deducts CAM, property tax, vacancy reserve, insurance from gross
CoCR parallel gate: NRY < 3.5% but CoCR >= tier minimum with DSCR > 1.25 → still viable
Seasonal adjustment: × 1.12 if current month is April-June for university anchors
DAS scoring: hospital + BTS proximity combination >= 40 points minimum
Summer vacancy: Tier C university properties apply 0.75 effective yield multiplier
Score output is 0-100 with weighted components matching rental-strategy.md report

stories.title: Flip strategy scorer
stories.description: Implement the FLIP strategy scoring module with 10 metrics from flip-strategy.md. Three sub-strategies: Quick Flip (6-12mo), Medium Hold (1-3yr), Renovation Flip. Key metrics: absorption rate, price momentum, listing velocity, net flip profit, comparable transaction evidence. Includes tax optimization (SBT vs stamp duty, tabien baan).
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/strategy_flip.py exists
Function score_flip(candidate, market_data, investor_profile) returns StrategyScore
Quick flip requires: discount >= 35%, absorption < 30mo, 2 sold comparables, net margin >= 15%
Medium hold requires: discount >= 25%, net margin >= 15% annualized
Renovation flip requires: reno cost < 20% of purchase, renovation ROI > 2x
Quick flip auto-rejects LED/SAM properties (cannot meet June 2026 transfer deadline)
Leveraged quick flips (<24mo) are rejected (financing overhead kills margin)
SBT vs stamp duty optimization calculated based on hold_horizon_years
Tabien baan 3.3% saving applied when investor_profile.tabien_baan = True and hold < 5yr
Minimum annualized return threshold is 15% (above SET index + illiquidity premium)

stories.title: Land banking strategy scorer
stories.description: Implement the LAND BANK strategy scoring module with 7 metrics from land-banking-strategy.md. Key metrics: Transit Proximity Score with infrastructure status taxonomy (confirmed/approved/planned/rumored), Land Price Momentum Index, Zoning Upside Score, Holding Cost Burden with 7% equity cost. Only applies to land and house+land property types.
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/strategy_landbank.py exists
Function score_landbank(candidate, market_data, investor_profile) returns StrategyScore
Infrastructure status multiplier: CONFIRMED=1.0, APPROVED=0.7, PLANNED=0.3, RUMORED=0.0
Rumored infrastructure = auto-reject
HCB uses 7% equity opportunity cost, not BoT 1%
Agricultural tax optimization only applied to plots > 1600 sqw with agricultural zoning
LPMI > 50% flags 'premium may be priced in'
Only scores properties with property_type containing land/house+land
Condos return score = None (not applicable)

stories.title: Renovation/hospitality strategy scorer
stories.description: Implement the RENO/HOSPITALITY strategy scoring module from renovation-hospitality-strategy.md. Four sub-strategies: Serviced Apartment (30+ day, low legal risk), Co-living, Mini Resort (landed only), STR (houses only). Hard gate: Legal Compliance Score >= 3. Condo STR = HARD REJECT. Operating cost stack = 53% of gross (fineng-corrected).
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/strategy_hospitality.py exists
Function score_hospitality(candidate, market_data, investor_profile) returns StrategyScore
Condo + STR (<30 day) = HARD REJECT with reason 'Hotel Act B.E. 2547'
Legal Compliance Score < 3 = REJECT
Operating cost stack uses 53% of gross (not 37.5%)
RROI formula: (annual_net_income - pre_reno_income) / renovation_cost >= 0.20
Renovation cost capped at 20% of purchase price
Houses/villas can score for STR sub-strategy
Serviced apartment (30+ day) is default for condo properties
Renovation financing cost modeled when reno > 20% of purchase

stories.title: Strategy router with cascade logic
stories.description: Implement the main orchestrator that routes each property through viable strategies with cascade logic. Property type determines eligible strategies. Failed flip cascades to rental. Failed bare rental cascades to furnished rental. Dual-strategy flag when both RENT >= 55 AND FLIP >= 55. Outputs best strategy recommendation per property.
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/strategy_router.py exists
Function route_and_score(candidate, market_data, investor_profile) returns PropertyResult with all strategy scores
Condo properties scored against: RENT, FLIP, HOSPITALITY (30+ day only)
Land properties scored against: LAND_BANK only
House+land scored against: FLIP, LAND_BANK, HOSPITALITY (all sub-types)
Cascade: if flip_score < 55, property is re-scored as RENT
Cascade: if rent_bare_score < 55 and investor has renovation budget, re-score as RENT_FURNISHED
Dual-strategy flag set when rent_score >= 55 AND flip_score >= 55
PropertyResult.best_strategy contains the highest-scoring viable strategy
PropertyResult.all_scores contains dict of strategy_name -> StrategyScore for all attempted strategies

stories.title: Financial engineering overlay
stories.description: Implement the financial engineering layer that runs after strategy scoring. Computes: IRR over hold period, cash vs leveraged comparison, tax optimization recommendation (personal vs corporate, tabien baan), hold period optimization, opportunity cost vs SET/bonds/REITs. Attaches FinancialMetrics to each PropertyResult.
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/financial_overlay.py exists
Function compute_financial_overlay(property_result, investor_profile) returns FinancialMetrics
IRR computed using full cashflow model (acquisition costs, monthly hold costs, exit costs, rental income)
Cash-on-cash return computed for leveraged investors
Tax recommendation: personal ownership for hold >= 5yr (saves 2.8% vs company SBT)
Tabien baan recommendation when hold < 5yr and investor is personal
Opportunity cost comparison: IRR vs SET 10%, Thai bonds 3%, REITs 7%
Hold cost per month breakdown: mortgage + CAM + insurance + vacancy reserve + property tax
Break-even occupancy computed for rental/hospitality strategies

stories.title: Refactor data extraction to support all property types
stories.description: Extend the existing extract_all_condos() to extract ALL property types (condos, houses, townhouses, land) for land banking and hospitality strategies. Add NPA vintage calculation (months since first_seen_at). Add LED auction round extraction.
acceptance_criteria: Function extract_all_properties() replaces extract_all_condos()
Extracts condos, houses, townhouses, land from all 6 providers
NPA vintage (months since first_seen_at) computed for each property
LED auction round count (total_auction_count) extracted from properties table
Property type normalized to enum: CONDO, HOUSE, TOWNHOUSE, LAND, HOUSE_AND_LAND, COMMERCIAL
Existing condo extraction SQL preserved (no regression)

stories.title: Multi-strategy report output
stories.description: Build the output formatter that generates a ranked report showing each property's best strategy, all strategy scores, financial metrics, and actionable recommendations. Markdown report + JSON export. Dual-strategy properties highlighted.
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/report_v2.py exists
Markdown report shows: summary table, per-strategy breakdown, top N candidates with detailed cards
Each property card shows: best strategy, all strategy scores, financial overlay, flags, recommendations
Dual-strategy properties have 'DUAL: RENT+FLIP' badge
IRR vs 16% benchmark displayed with color coding (above/below)
JSON export includes all strategy scores and financial metrics per property
Tax optimization recommendation in each card (personal/corporate, tabien baan)
Report saved to workspace/output/npa-screening-v2-{date}.md and .json

stories.title: Main pipeline orchestrator (screener_v2.py)
stories.description: Wire everything together: CLI entry point that accepts InvestorProfile args, extracts properties, enriches with market data, runs financial pre-filter, routes through strategies, applies financial overlay, generates report. Reuses existing market enrichment and proximity computation from screener.py.
acceptance_criteria: File workspace/skills/npa-screener/scripts/screener_v2.py exists with CLI interface
CLI accepts: --purchase-mode cash/mortgage, --ltv, --hold-years, --entity personal/company, --tabien-baan, --reno-budget, --strategies, --province, --max-price, --top N, --json
Pipeline: extract → enrich market → compute proximity → financial prefilter → strategy router → financial overlay → report
Reuses enrich_with_market_data() and compute_proximity() from screener.py
python screener_v2.py --purchase-mode cash --hold-years 5 --strategies rent,flip --json runs successfully
Output files generated in workspace/output/

stories.title: Integration test: full pipeline on real DB data
stories.description: Run the complete v2 pipeline against the live NPA database (12,774+ condos + houses/land) with both cash and mortgage investor profiles. Verify that strategy distribution makes sense, cascade logic triggers correctly, financial metrics are realistic, and no runtime errors on real data.
acceptance_criteria: screener_v2.py --purchase-mode cash --hold-years 5 --strategies all completes without error
screener_v2.py --purchase-mode mortgage --ltv 0.7 --hold-years 5 --strategies rent,flip completes without error
At least 3 strategies produce scored results (not all REJECT)
Cascade logic triggers: at least 1 property shows 'failed flip → rental candidate'
Dual-strategy flag triggers: at least 1 property scored for both RENT and FLIP
Financial pre-filter rejects some properties (not 0% and not 100%)
IRR benchmark comparison appears in output
No NaN, Inf, or division-by-zero errors in financial metrics
Report markdown renders correctly with no broken tables
